crisis_events.label: Global Food Crisis
crisis_events.description: Oil price surge, biofuel demand, and Australian drought caused food riots in 30+ countries.

crisis_events.label: Sustained Price Shock
crisis_events.description: Russian drought and wheat export ban (2010), Arab Spring food unrest (2011), prolonged supply tightness through 2014.

crisis_events.label: COVID Supply Shock
crisis_events.description: Pandemic disrupted global logistics, labour shortages hit harvests, panic buying inflated demand.

crisis_events.label: Ukraine War
crisis_events.description: Russia invaded Ukraine in February 2022. Together they supply ~30% of global wheat and ~60% of sunflower oil.

articles.title: The war in Ukraine is fuelling a global food crisis

crisis_events.label: Red Sea & Iran Conflict
crisis_events.description: Houthi Red Sea attacks from 2023, escalating to US-Israel strikes on Iran and Hormuz closure in 2026.
